steps.title: Scene display area resolved
steps.action: use live scene dimensions for portal placement and drag bounds
steps.expected_visual: portal can be dragged across the full HUD surface

steps.title: Portal size resolved
steps.action: scale portal defaults from live scene dimensions unless explicit size overrides were provided
steps.expected_visual: portal occupies a readable portion of the detected display

steps.title: Focused portal Ctrl resize hotkeys
steps.action: focus composer and inject Ctrl+=, Ctrl++, Ctrl+- through Windows SendInput
steps.expected_visual: focused INPUT portal tile grows on Ctrl+= and Ctrl++, then shrinks on Ctrl+-

steps.title: Composer focus gained
steps.action: runtime focus manager focused the composer hit region
steps.expected_visual: subsequent keyboard events route to composer

steps.title: Composer pointer down
steps.expected_visual: keyboard focus should move to composer

steps.title: Composer key down received (observed)
steps.action: runtime delivered key input; draft state update arrives via composer_draft_state
steps.expected_visual: editing result arrives via runtime-owned draft-state event

steps.title: Composer key up received (observed)
steps.action: runtime delivered key release; used to diagnose OS key delivery
steps.expected_visual: no visible change expected from release alone

steps.title: Composer key down received (observed)
steps.action: runtime delivered key input; draft state update arrives via composer_draft_state
steps.expected_visual: editing result arrives via runtime-owned draft-state event

steps.title: Composer key down received (observed)
steps.action: runtime delivered key input; draft state update arrives via composer_draft_state
steps.expected_visual: editing result arrives via runtime-owned draft-state event

steps.title: Composer key up received (observed)
steps.action: runtime delivered key release; used to diagnose OS key delivery
steps.expected_visual: no visible change expected from release alone

steps.title: Composer key up received (observed)
steps.action: runtime delivered key release; used to diagnose OS key delivery
steps.expected_visual: no visible change expected from release alone

steps.title: Composer key down received (observed)
steps.action: runtime delivered key input; draft state update arrives via composer_draft_state
steps.expected_visual: editing result arrives via runtime-owned draft-state event

steps.title: Composer key up received (observed)
steps.action: runtime delivered key release; used to diagnose OS key delivery
steps.expected_visual: no visible change expected from release alone

steps.title: Focused portal resize hotkeys injected
steps.action: Windows scheduled-task injector clicked the composer and sent Ctrl resize chords
steps.expected_visual: geometry events should follow if the focused portal consumed the hotkeys

steps.title: Focused portal Ctrl resize hotkeys
steps.action: timed out waiting for focused portal geometry after Ctrl resize injection
steps.expected_visual: no acceptance claim; focused portal did not visibly resize
steps.error: timed out waiting for focused portal resize geometry event

steps.title: Portal lease released
steps.action: release the lease before closing the session
steps.expected_visual: all portal tiles are removed from the HUD
